description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a lush green yard and enclosed by a wooden fence. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored brick or concrete, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light. The front features a paved driveway and a landscaped entrance with palm trees and shrubs, while the backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating and additional greenery. The roof is flat, consistent with contemporary architectural styles, and the layout is open with visible interior spaces such as a living room, kitchen, and bedrooms. The property is bordered by a mix of grass, flower beds, and mature trees, creating a private and inviting atmosphere. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light brick exterior, large windows, and landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, and landscaped garden with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, outdoor seating area, and extensive green lawn.
description_view_2: Back view displaying grouped windows, a private garden area, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the driveway, side entrance, and a mix of greenery and flower beds along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
